title: Stardust Origins
body:
## What is this mod?

**Stardust Origins** is a mod for Origins that lets you play as various creatures, with their own proficiencies and struggles!

Our philosophy is to make players think "hey, I could get real silly with this one!" while keeping origins balanced, approachable, and comfortable.

Are you a gentle fairy blessing the world with your presence? A feisty rabbit expanding its horizons? An animated doll guarding ruins long gone? A brave dog fending for another?

What are you, in that clockwork heart of yours?

## What do I get?
![a grid of four cards. each card contains a sigil, an Origin name, and a summary of their traits. koijokin is a strong clay doll, olinawenkin is a carnivore hunter, utalasewikin is a nimble herbivore fighter, and usawililikin is able to fly.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c3abe37cee9d990e09975ac0c7cb4f22af18bdb_0.webp)

## What do I need?
**Stardust Origins** requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins), [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli), and [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui).

Compatibility is not ensured with Forge, but most functionalities should work.

This mod must be installed both server-side and client-side, as it uses custom textures.

<details>
<summary>utalasewikin? koijokin? What do these words mean?</summary>

It's toki pona! More specifically, combinations of sitelen pona characters.
You can learn toki pona on [mun.la](https://mun.la/sona/index.html), and find a dictionary on [nimi.li](https://nimi.li/).
</details>
